applyTo: '**'

Project Overview
Building Sahayak - An AI-powered multilingual mobile app for under-resourced Indian schools supporting teachers in multi-grade classrooms. This is a hackathon project, so prioritize speed and functionality over enterprise-level architecture.
Code Style & Architecture Guidelines
General Principles

Write modular, reusable code suitable for hackathon pace
Prioritize functionality over perfection
Use clear naming conventions and simple folder structure
Add minimal but essential comments
Focus on MVP features first

UI/UX Guidelines
Design Principles

Simple, teacher-friendly interface
Large buttons and text for easy mobile use
Offline-first approach with sync when online
Multilingual support (Hindi, English, regional languages)
Dark/Light theme support

Screen Structure

Use Scaffold with AppBar for consistent navigation
Implement bottom navigation for main agent access
Add floating action buttons for quick actions
Use Cards and ListTiles for content organization
